decks.notes: The focus of this deck is to quickly assemble and protect the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful win condition. By using card draw and counterspells, the player aims to disrupt their opponent's game plan while efficiently drawing into the necessary pieces for their combo. The deck is designed to be fast-paced and reactive, aiming to secure a win early in the game through careful resource management and strategic play.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly and aggressively burn your opponent's life total down using efficient creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Ball Lightning, as well as direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast. The deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and finish them off before they have a chance to stabilize. With a low mana curve and plenty of burn spells, this deck is designed to keep the pressure on and force the opponent to react quickly or risk losing the game.

This deck aims to quickly fill the graveyard with key cards like Ill-Gotten Gains, Brain Freeze, and Tormod's Crypt before casting powerful spells like Intuition and Cabal Ritual to combo off and win the game. It utilizes cards like Lion's Eye Diamond and Lotus Petal to generate mana quickly, allowing for explosive turns that can overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes card draw spells like Deep Analysis and Infernal Contract to help find combo pieces, while disruption like Arcane Denial and Chain of Vapor protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan.

The focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures, such as Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Rorix Bladewing, and then bring them back onto the battlefield using spells like Reanimate and Exhume. By using cards like Cabal Therapy and Unmask to disrupt the opponent's hand and control the board with creatures like Verdant Force, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful threats early on. It combines fast mana acceleration with graveyard recursion to create a deadly reanimation combo strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive Goblin creatures, utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to get creatures onto the battlefield quickly. Cards like Goblin Ringleader and Goblin Warchief help to maintain card advantage and reduce the cost of casting Goblins. Gempalm Incinerator serves as removal and a way to cycle through the deck. The deck also includes some utility cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The overall strategy is to flood the battlefield with Goblins and quickly close out the game.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by denying your opponent resources through counterspells, removal spells like Swords to Plowshares, and land destruction with Wasteland and Dust Bowl. This strategy aims to lock down the game and win through incremental advantage with Standstill, while also having win conditions in the form of creature lands like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave, as well as powerful finishers like Exalted Angel and Decree of Justice. The deck also has card advantage engines like Fact or Fiction and Nevinyrral's Disk to stay ahead in the late game.

The key idea of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with enchantments using cards like Attunement and Frantic Search, then casting Replenish to bring them all back onto the battlefield at once. This creates a powerful board state with cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave. The deck also includes disruption cards like Decree of Silence and Seal of Cleansing to control the game and protect the combo. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence and win the game through the synergy of enchantments.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of removal spells, discard, and resilient creatures to outvalue the opponent. By exploiting disruptive cards like Cabal Therapy, Duress, and Ravenous Rats, in combination with versatile threats like Treetop Village and Krosan Tusker, the deck aims to dismantle the opponent's game plan while gradually establishing a dominant board presence. The inclusion of cards like Phyrexian Furnace and Dust Bowl further solidify its control strategy by disrupting the opponent's resources. Overall, this deck seeks to grind out wins through attrition and efficient resource management.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. It combines efficient removal like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate with powerful threats like Arrogant Wurm and Wild Mongrel. Survival of the Fittest helps to find key creatures while Call of the Herd provides additional threats. The inclusion of Wasteland disrupts the opponent's mana base, while cards like Basking Rootwalla and Grim Lavamancer provide consistent damage. The deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain a steady stream of threats to close out the game quickly.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize enchantments to create a strong combo strategy. The key idea is to use cards like Enchantress's Presence and Mirri's Guile to draw more enchantments, while also generating mana with cards like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum. The deck then aims to win through cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave, with the ability to recur enchantments with Replenish. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Sterling Grove and Seal of Cleansing for protection and removal, creating a versatile and powerful enchantress combo strategy.

The main focus of this RG Aggro deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures and burn spells in order to overwhelm the opponent and deal damage as efficiently as possible. The deck is built around utilizing creatures with strong abilities like Basking Rootwalla, Wild Mongrel, and Quirion Dryad, backed up by burn spells such as Lightning Bolt and Incinerate to clear the path for an aggressive assault. The deck also includes cards like Treetop Village and Wasteland to provide additional utility and disruption.

The deck focuses on combining enchantresses with various enchantments to generate card advantage and mana ramp, while also utilizing Opalescence to turn enchantments into creatures for an alternate win condition. It includes disruption cards like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing to survive against aggressive opponents, as well as defensive cards like Solitary Confinement and Parallax Wave to protect the win condition. The deck aims to control the board and gradually assemble its combo pieces to overwhelm the opponent with a large amount of enchantments and powerful creatures.

The deck revolves around the synergy between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle, aiming to cheat out the powerful creature while mitigating its drawback. It combines card draw and counter spells to protect the combo and disrupt opponents, with a focus on fast, efficient plays. The deck seeks to control the pace of the game and win through a quick and explosive combo finish.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. It aims to stall the game until it can establish a dominant position with powerful control cards like Wrath of God and Humility. The deck also seeks to disrupt the opponent's strategy by destroying key permanents with cards like Disenchant and Dismantling Blow. The win condition typically involves generating card advantage with Accumulated Knowledge and controlling the board with Mishra's Factory. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through superior card advantage and control.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Replenish combo to maximize value by recurring enchantments from the graveyard. It includes cards like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to create powerful board presence and control the game. The deck also includes cards like Swords to Plowshares and Mana Leak for disruption and protection. The goal is to set up the combo pieces quickly and efficiently, while controlling the board to ensure a solid win condition. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful enchantment-based combo strategy.

This deck focuses on dealing damage quickly and efficiently, utilizing aggressive creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Mogg Fanatic along with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Flame Rift. The goal is to reduce the opponent's life total as quickly as possible through a combination of direct damage and creature attacks. Ensnaring Bridge and Sulfuric Vortex provide additional control and pressure, while cards like Pyrostatic Pillar and Black Vise punish opponents for holding too many cards in hand. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a relentless assault.
